title: xorg-x11-server-Xwayland security update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 8.
full_text:
[21.1.3-19]
- CVE fix for: CVE-2025-62229 (RHEL-119967), CVE-2025-62230 (RHEL-120015),
               CVE-2025-62231 (RHEL-125007)
